title: video-pipeline.04-finalizing
description: Outgoing message produced by chunker to the finalizing topic. Indicates that HLS chunking is complete and the master playlist is available.

user_id.description: ID of the user who uploaded the video.

video_id.description: Unique identifier for the uploaded video.

manifest_filename.description: Filename of the master HLS playlist in videos-ready/{video_item_id}/.
